Headline: Temporary Reroute at 87th/Exchange
ShortDescription: #87 buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Yates, 83rd, Commercial and 87th due to police activity near 87th/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#87 buses are temporarily rerouted via 87th, Yates, 83rd, Commercial and 87th due to police activity near 87th/Exchange.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Temporary Southbound Reroute near 76th/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Southbound #53 buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, 79th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, 79th, Cicero, 76th and the Ford City terminal due to a street blockage.
